　　Two Chicago couples struggle to keep their love alive as secrets and long-simmering resentments rise to the surface.In Rogers Park, four intertwined lives begin to buckle under midlife pressures.Zeke and his wife Grace navigate parenthood and a financial reversal of fortune.
